activities.title: Feelings Have Names
activities.ariaPrompt: Did you know that all feelings have names? Happy, sad, scared, surprised, angry, calm — these are all feeling words! Can you show me with your face what 'happy' looks like?
followUps: Now show me 'surprised'! What does your face do?
Have you felt angry today? Yesterday? That's completely okay.
When you feel worried, what helps you feel a little better?

activities.title: Washing Our Hands
activities.ariaPrompt: Here's an important secret — tiny things called germs can make us sick, but we can't even see them! Washing our hands helps keep germs away. When is the best time to wash your hands?
followUps: Do you wash your hands before eating? After the toilet?
Can you show me or describe how you wash your hands? Step by step!
Why do you think keeping clean helps us stay healthy?

activities.title: Safe Adults
activities.ariaPrompt: We all need grown-ups we can trust. A safe adult is someone who makes you feel protected and cared for. Can you think of one grown-up in your life who feels safe to you?
followUps: What makes that person feel safe to you?
If something worried you or scared you, could you tell that person?
Remember: you never have to keep secrets that make you feel bad or scared.
